prompts.name: Summarize Entity
prompts.description: Generate a natural-language summary of a specific entity (item or category)

arguments.name: entity_type
arguments.description: The type of entity to summarize (item or category)

arguments.name: entity_id
arguments.description: The ID of the entity to summarize

prompts.name: Generate Report
prompts.description: Generate a structured report about inventory data

arguments.name: report_type
arguments.description: Type of report: inventory-summary, low-stock, or category-breakdown
